arts.ttl: Man Utd are a massive club, not massive team - Amorim
arts.sum: New head coach Ruben Amorim says Manchester United are "a massive club but not a massive team" as he tries to steer the club back towards the top of the English game.

arts.ttl: 'Mad dogs' - Ruben Amorim quotes Jose Mourinho to highlight Manchester United issues
arts.sum: Man United's running stats have been a problem for several years and Ruben Amorim reminded the players of the level they need to operate at.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim breaks silence on Manchester United not wearing LGBTQ+ jacket
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui refused to wear a rainbow-themed jacket and Man United players decided to scrap the plan altogether.

arts.ttl: Man Utd problems laid bare by Amorim | 'Massive club, not a massive team'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has claimed his side are a "massive club but not a massive team" and has highlighted their work-rate off the ball as an area that needs improvement.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals key factor behind Man United stars abandoning plans to wear LGBT rainbow jackets after Noussair Mazraoui refusal - as he insists there is 'no doubt' over the club's values
arts.sum: The gesture went against the religious beliefs of Noussair Mazraoui so the rest of the United players decided not to leave the Moroccan as the odd man out when they walked out at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes brutal admission on how far Man Utd have fallen since Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: The new Manchester United boss is desperate to return the club to their glory days, but he knows it will take a long time after over a decade in the relative wilderness

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim responds after Man Utd stars ditched Rainbow jackets due to Noussair Mazraoui
arts.sum: United's players had been due to wear the jackets in support of the LGBTQ+ community before last weekend's 4-0 win over Everton, but defender Noussair Mazraoui refused to do so

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Ruthless Man Utd ready to AXE Antony and Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United are willing to sell Antony and Marcus Rashford in 2025 should suitable offers arrive, according to a report. Reporter Florian Plettenberg claims that €95 million flop Antony could be sold as early as January should a suitable offer arrive.

arts.ttl: Serie A sensation confirms Man Utd and Chelsea offers
arts.sum: Parma goalkeeper Zion Suzuki has confirmed that he previously received offers from Chelsea and Manchester United . Serie A sensation confirms Man Utd and Chelsea offers

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich director drops Alphonso Davies update amid Liverpool and Manchester United contact
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United may be on different levels right now, but they are likely to be going for the same high-level targets in 2025....
